description: Use this API to open a PSSE Saved Case file and transfers its data into the PSSE working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = case(sfile)

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of the psse saved case file if sfile is “*”, casenw attempts to reopen the most recently accessed saved case file. if no saved case file was accessed in the current execution of psse, casenw returns an error code. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
